creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Created attachment 229656
net-mgmt/prometheus2: Update to 2.30.3

This patch updates net-mgmt/prometheus2 to v2.30.3, which includes multiple bugfixes.

This is a minor update before bumping the port to the latest version of 2.31.1.

Changelogs since the last port update can be found at:

  - https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/releases/tag/v2.30.1
  - https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/releases/tag/v2.30.2
  - https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/releases/tag/v2.30.3

-David
